clinical_blockers: Uncomplicated nausea, vomiting, fatigue, urinary frequency, dehydration, CBC, urine dip, and medication management remain unsupported by the reviewed sections.
Threatened miscarriage and viability-query labels must not be inferred from symptoms.
UAE referral pathways and qualified clinician review remain unresolved.
